arts.ttl: Milan Owner Working to Stay in Charge a While Longer
arts.sum: Gerry Cardinale plans to keep ahold of Milan for the foreseeable future and is working to refinance the debt accumulated with Elliott. He took over the club from the American fund through a vendor loan that has to be paid through a bullet payment. The post Milan Owner Working to Stay in Charge a While Longer appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Preview: AC Milan vs. Red Star Belgrade - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Champions League clash between AC Milan and Red Star Belgrade, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
